title: Wide Hoppers
description: A new hopper with an extended item collection range
body:
It sucks in items in a 3x3 radius and is twice as fast than a normal hopper.

Acts like a regular hoppers, including using redstone to lock it.

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1h0lnudC/images/aaa4223e900b871a0bb23e3697583fbf81ffe5d4.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
